currentPosition.summary: The team is actively engaged in testing on silicon, with significant progress noted in various measurement and debug tasks.

stages.stageName: Test procedure creation (GitHub, lab HW resources)

tasks.name: N3: QS127S benchtop experiment to find statics settings for 22 MHz carrier frequency
tasks.detail: Experiment to find static settings for a 22 MHz carrier frequency has been completed.

tasks.name: N3: [QS127M Bench] Carrier PLL test.
tasks.detail: Carrier PLL test for QS127M is in progress with results in line with design expectations.

tasks.name: N3: [QS127M Bench] Baseband schedule bidirectional test.
tasks.detail: Bidirectional baseband schedule test for QS127M is in progress.

tasks.name: N3: [QS127M Bench] PER with FG test with AGC with ECC + CRC.
tasks.detail: PER test with AGC and ECC+CRC for QS127M is in progress.

tasks.name: N3: [QS127M Bench] PER with FG test with AGC without ecc +crc
tasks.detail: PER test with AGC without ECC+CRC for QS127M is in progress.

stages.stageName: Meets design expectations? (YES → next stage, NO → debug & loop back to Stage 6)
Feedback to Architect/Design (loops back to Stage 2 for next-gen)

blockers.reason: Lack of detailed description and unclear status requires follow-up.
Discussions on power modes and core interactions are causing delays.

nextStep: Continue testing on silicon, focusing on completing the current set of tests and addressing any emerging issues. Follow up on firmware bring-up and RTL design discussions.
